summary: Full HIGH-risk test suite: Kotlin 513 passing, 0 failing (baseline 503 + 10 new). JS pure tests 15/15. Bundle --check silent. Combined Reviewer noted 2 minor spec gaps (applicationId vs activity comparison; visual-only stale gating) deemed acceptable.
spec_gaps_accepted: applicationId comparison omitted — packageName is bound to session and a different package surfaces as background blocked reason
Pin manipulation while stale not gated — visual-only notice; pins anchored in frozen image coords are harmless data-wise
